title: Smile Makeovers & Veneers
description: Bespoke smile design with porcelain veneers, micro-contouring and digital previews — so you see the outcome on screen long before any treatment begins.

title: Dental Implants
description: Single-tooth, multiple and full-arch implant rehabilitation using titanium fixtures with CBCT-guided placement and zirconia crowns.

title: Teeth Whitening
description: In-office and take-home whitening systems calibrated to your enamel — lasting brightness without the sensitivity that usually follows.

title: Root Canal Therapy
description: Single-visit endodontics performed under magnification — saving the tooth and ending the pain, comfortably and for the long term.

title: Orthodontics & Aligners
description: Clear aligners and modern braces for adults and teens, with progress reviews and gentle, planned movement throughout.

title: Crowns & Bridges
description: All-ceramic and zirconia restorations crafted to match neighbouring teeth with quiet, almost invisible precision.

title: Periodontal & Gum Care
description: Deep cleaning, scaling, root planing and periodontal therapy with long-term maintenance plans tailored to your gum profile.

title: Pediatric Dentistry
description: Patient, child-led visits for cleaning, fluoride and early orthodontic guidance — building trust from the very first chair.

title: Oral Surgery
description: Wisdom-tooth removal, biopsies and minor oral surgery handled gently, with clear aftercare and recovery guidance.
